title: Delhi HC slams CAT for questioning mental abilities of litigant, denying his request for lawyer
description: The Delhi High Court recently expressed strong disapproval with the Central Administrative Tribunal (CAT) for questioning the mental abilities of a litigant and rejecting the plea without considering the merits of the case.A Division Bench of Justices C Hari Shankar and Om Prakash Shukla said that the courts and high judicial tribunals like CAT are expected to exercise balance and restraint. “The Tribunal had no authority, whatsoever, to doubt the mental stability of the petitioner. The Tri
